[
  {"task": "Verify presence of 'test_data.csv' in current directory", "priority": 23},
  {"task": "Load CSV file into pandas DataFrame", "priority": 22},
  {"task": "Examine DataFrame structure (info, head, dtypes, missing values)", "priority": 21},
  {"task": "Handle missing values (impute or drop)", "priority": 20},
  {"task": "Correct data types of columns", "priority": 19},
  {"task": "Detect and treat outliers using IQR or Z-score", "priority": 18},
  {"task": "Encode categorical variables (if any)", "priority": 17},
  {"task": "Generate summary statistics (mean, median, std, min, max)", "priority": 16},
  {"task": "Create distribution visualizations (histograms, boxplots) and output Plotly JSON", "priority": 15},
  {"task": "Create correlation heatmap and output Plotly JSON", "priority": 14},
  {"task": "Create pairwise scatter plots for feature relationships", "priority": 13},
  {"task": "Perform feature engineering (create interaction/polynomial/date-derived features)", "priority": 12},
  {"task": "Scale/normalize numeric features", "priority": 11},
  {"task": "Encode categorical variables (one-hot or label encoding)", "priority": 10},
  {"task": "Split dataset into training and testing sets (80/20) with fixed random state", "priority": 9},
  {"task": "Train baseline Linear Regression model", "priority": 8},
  {"task": "Train Random Forest Regressor model", "priority": 7},
  {"task": "Train Gradient Boosting Regressor (or XGBoost) model", "priority": 6},
  {"task": "Perform cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning for each model", "priority": 5},
  {"task": "Evaluate each model on test set using RMSE, MAE, R²", "priority": 4},
  {"task": "Compare model performance and select best-performing model", "priority": 3},
  {"task": "Save best model and preprocessing pipeline for future use", "priority": 2},
  {"task": "Return EDA visualizations (Plotly JSON), feature importance, and final evaluation results", "priority": 1}
]
